title: Activate real placeOrder() calls with 2 ICP fixed order size

requirements.text: In the backend trading loop (tradingLoop()), replace all Debug.print stubs for order placement with actual placeOrder() calls to the ICDex canister at 'jgxow-pqaaa-aaaar-qahaq-cai'. Each order (both BUY and SELL) must use a fixed quantity of 2 ICP (represented as 200_000_000 e8s). Place all orders in the newly computed grid. Do not implement cancelOrder or grid repositioning in this step.

quotes: Ativar as chamadas reais ao placeOrder() no ICDex com ordens de 2 ICP fixos por ordem (BUY e SELL), sem mexer no reposicionamento ainda

acceptanceCriteria: tradingLoop() calls placeOrder() on the ICDex canister for each computed grid level instead of Debug.print
Each order uses a fixed quantity of 2 ICP (200_000_000 e8s) for both BUY and SELL sides
cancelOrder() and grid repositioning logic are NOT included in this change
The bot continues to start/stop correctly via startBot() and stopBot()
The grid is still computed using the existing spreadBps and numOrders configuration

constraints: Do not implement cancelOrder() or smart grid repositioning in this step
Do not change the existing frontend components or polling hooks
Order quantity must be exactly 2 ICP (200_000_000 e8s) — fixed, not calculated from price
nonGoals: Dynamic order size calculation based on USD value
Smart grid repositioning comparing open orders vs. new grid
